member.name: M:Turnify.Helpers.LocationHelper.GetCurrentLocationAsync
member.summary: Retrieves the current location of the device.
member.returns: The current location as a object.

member.name: M:Turnify.Helpers.LocationHelper.DecodePolyline(System.String)
member.summary: Decodes an encoded polyline string into a list of coordinates.
member.returns: A list of objects representing the decoded points.
